channel.title: Research & Innovation on Al-Qadisiyah University

item.title: Patents & IP
item.description:
Patents

Registered Patents

Year Count
2025 15
2024 12
2023 10

Intellectual Property

We support researchers in patent registration.

  • patents@qu.edu.iq

item.title: Publications & Journals
item.description:
Scientific Journals

The university publishes several peer-reviewed scientific journals.

Journals

  • Journal of Al-Qadisiyah for Pure Sciences
  • Al-Qadisiyah Journal for Engineering Sciences
  • Al-Qadisiyah Journal for Humanities

Contact

  • journals@qu.edu.iq

item.title: Scientific Journals
item.description:
University Journals

Al-Qadisiyah University publishes a set of peer-reviewed scientific journals across multiple disciplines. All journals follow Open Access principles.

📚 The full archive is available on the University Digital Repository.

Journals

Al-Qadisiyah Journal of Pure Sciences

  • Scope: Mathematics, physics, chemistry, life sciences, computer science
  • Frequency: Quarterly
  • ISSN: TODO
  • Submit: Submit a paper
  • Archive: All issues

Al-Qadisiyah Journal of Humanities

  • Scope: Literature, history, geography, philosophy, social sciences
  • Frequency: Quarterly
  • ISSN: TODO
  • Submit: Submit a paper
  • Archive: All issues

Al-Qadisiyah Journal of Engineering Sciences

  • Scope: Engineering, technology, infrastructure
  • Frequency: Bi-annual
  • ISSN: TODO
  • Submit: Submit a paper
  • Archive: All issues

Al-Qadisiyah Medical Journal

  • Scope: Human medicine, dentistry, pharmacy, nursing
  • Frequency: Quarterly
  • ISSN: TODO
  • Submit: Submit a paper
  • Archive: All issues

Editor note: Confirm the actual ISSN numbers and update the submission portal links (OJS or otherwise).
